# Cat Product Terminology - French Translation Guide

French translations for cat-themed products and terminology used in OctoCAT Supply.

## Basic Cat Terms

| English | French | Gender | Pronunciation Tip |
|---------|--------|--------|-------------------|
| Cat | Chat | m | "sha" |
| Cats | Chats | m, pl | "sha" |
| Female cat | Chatte | f | Use sparingly - "chat" works for both |
| Kitten | Chaton | m | "sha-ton" |
| Kittens | Chatons | m, pl | |
| Cat lover | Amateur de chats | m/f | Or "Amoureux des chats" |
| Cat owner | Propriétaire de chat | m/f | |
| Feline | Félin | m | |

## Cat Anatomy

| English | French | Gender | Notes |
|---------|--------|--------|-------|
| Paw | Patte | f | |
| Paws | Pattes | f, pl | |
| Whiskers | Moustaches | f, pl | Also means human mustache |
| Tail | Queue | f | |
| Fur | Fourrure | f | Or "Pelage" for coat |
| Coat | Pelage | m | |
| Ears | Oreilles | f, pl | |
| Eyes | Yeux | m, pl | |
| Claws | Griffes | f, pl | |
| Nose | Truffe | f | "Nez" is human nose |

## Cat Sounds & Behaviors

| English | French | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Meow | Miaou | Onomatopoeia |
| To meow | Miauler | Verb |
| Purr | Ronronnement | m, noun |
| To purr | Ronronner | Verb |
| Hiss | Feulement | m, noun |
| To hiss | Feuler | Verb |
| Scratch | Griffure | f, noun (the mark) |
| To scratch | Griffer | Verb |
| Stretch | Étirement | m, noun |
| To stretch | S'étirer | Verb |
| Nap | Sieste | f, noun |
| To nap | Faire la sieste | Verb phrase |

## Cat Food Products

| English | French | Gender | Notes |
|---------|--------|--------|-------|
| Cat food | Nourriture pour chat | f | Or "Alimentation chat" |
| Dry food | Croquettes | f, pl | Most common term |
| Wet food | Pâtée | f | Or "Nourriture humide" |
| Treats | Friandises | f, pl | |
| Kibble | Croquettes | f, pl | Same as dry food |
| Food bowl | Gamelle | f | Or "Écuelle" |
| Water bowl | Gamelle d'eau | f | |
| Automatic feeder | Distributeur automatique | m | |
| Food mat | Tapis de gamelle | m | |
| Elevated bowl | Gamelle surélevée | f | |

## Cat Accessories

| English | French | Gender | Notes |
|---------|--------|--------|-------|
| Cat bed | Panier pour chat | m | Or "Couchage chat" |
| Cat house | Maison pour chat | f | Or "Niche pour chat" |
| Cat tree | Arbre à chat | m | |
| Scratching post | Griffoir | m | Or "Poteau à griffer" |
| Scratching pad | Planche à griffer | f | |
| Litter box | Bac à litière | m | Or "Litière" (general) |
| Litter | Litière | f | |
| Cat carrier | Cage de transport | f | Or "Sac de transport" |
| Collar | Collier | m | |
| Leash | Laisse | f | |
| Harness | Harnais | m | |
| ID tag | Médaille d'identification | f | |
| Cat flap | Chatière | f | |
| Cat door | Porte pour chat | f | |
| Window perch | Hamac de fenêtre | m | |

## Cat Toys

| English | French | Gender | Notes |
|---------|--------|--------|-------|
| Cat toy | Jouet pour chat | m | |
| Toy mouse | Souris jouet | f | Or "Fausse souris" |
| Feather toy | Jouet à plumes | m | |
| Catnip | Herbe à chat | f | Or "Cataire" |
| Catnip toy | Jouet à l'herbe à chat | m | |
| Laser pointer | Pointeur laser | m | |
| Ball | Balle | f | |
| Interactive toy | Jouet interactif | m | |
| Puzzle feeder | Distributeur puzzle | m | |
| Tunnel | Tunnel | m | |
| Teaser wand | Canne à pêche | f | Common term for feather wands |

## Cat Health & Care

| English | French | Gender | Notes |
|---------|--------|--------|-------|
| Veterinarian | Vétérinaire | m/f | |
| Vet visit | Visite chez le vétérinaire | f | |
| Vaccination | Vaccination | f | |
| Flea treatment | Traitement anti-puces | m | |
| Tick treatment | Traitement anti-tiques | m | |
| Deworming | Vermifuge | m | |
| Grooming | Toilettage | m | |
| Brush | Brosse | f | |
| Comb | Peigne | m | |
| Nail clipper | Coupe-griffes | m | |
| Shampoo | Shampooing | m | |
| Microchip | Puce électronique | f | |
| Neutering | Castration | f | (male) |
| Spaying | Stérilisation | f | (female) |
| Indoor cat | Chat d'intérieur | m | |
| Outdoor cat | Chat d'extérieur | m | |

## Cat Breeds (Common)

| English | French | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Persian | Persan | |
| Siamese | Siamois | |
| Maine Coon | Maine Coon | Keep English name |
| British Shorthair | British Shorthair | Keep English name |
| Ragdoll | Ragdoll | Keep English name |
| Bengal | Bengal | |
| Sphynx | Sphynx | |
| Scottish Fold | Scottish Fold | Keep English name |
| Abyssinian | Abyssin | |
| Russian Blue | Bleu Russe | |
| Norwegian Forest | Norvégien | |
| Mixed breed | Chat de gouttière | m, informal |
| Purebred | Chat de race | m |

## Cat-Themed Marketing Phrases

| English | French |
|---------|--------|
| For cat lovers | Pour les amoureux des chats |
| Purrfect for your cat | Parfait pour votre chat |
| The cat's meow | Le nec plus ultra |
| Cat-approved | Approuvé par les chats |
| Designed for cats | Conçu pour les chats |
| Your cat deserves the best | Votre chat mérite le meilleur |
| Happy cat, happy life | Chat heureux, vie heureuse |
| Premium cat products | Produits premium pour chats |
| Made with love for cats | Fait avec amour pour les chats |
| Join our cat community | Rejoignez notre communauté féline |

## OctoCAT Specific Terms

Since OctoCAT Supply has cat-themed branding, here are suggestions:

| English | French | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| OctoCAT Supply | OctoCAT Supply | Keep brand name |
| The OctoCAT family | La famille OctoCAT | |
| OctoCAT customers | Clients OctoCAT | |
| OctoCAT rewards | Récompenses OctoCAT | |
| OctoCAT points | Points OctoCAT | |
| Cat-alogue | Cat-alogue | Keep pun, or "Catalogue" |
| Pawsome deals | Offres paw-some | Keep pun or "Super offres" |
| Meow-velous | Miaou-veilleux | French pun adaptation |

## Common Product Descriptions

### Template Phrases

| English | French |
|---------|--------|
| Ideal for all cats | Idéal pour tous les chats |
| Suitable for kittens | Convient aux chatons |
| For indoor cats | Pour les chats d'intérieur |
| For outdoor cats | Pour les chats d'extérieur |
| Easy to clean | Facile à nettoyer |
| Machine washable | Lavable en machine |
| Non-toxic | Non toxique |
| Safe for cats | Sans danger pour les chats |
| Veterinarian recommended | Recommandé par les vétérinaires |
| Made in France | Fabriqué en France |

### Size Descriptions

| English | French |
|---------|--------|
| For small cats | Pour petits chats |
| For medium cats | Pour chats de taille moyenne |
| For large cats | Pour grands chats |
| One size fits all | Taille unique |
| Adjustable | Ajustable |
| Compact | Compact |
| Extra large | Très grand / XXL |
